Get Curve Value
La destinazione è Istanza animazione

Get Curve Value
La destinazione è Istanza animazione
Calculate the Pelvis Alpha by finding the average Foot IK weight. If the alpha is 0, clear the offset.
nodes.comment: Calculate the Pelvis Alpha by finding the average Foot IK weight. If the alpha is 0, clear the offset.

nodes.title: Step 1: Set the new Pelvis Target to be the lowest Foot Offset
nodes.comment: Step 1: Set the new Pelvis Target to be the lowest Foot Offset

nodes.title: Step 2: Interp the Current Pelvis Offset to the new target value. Interpolate at different speeds based on whether the new target is above or below the current one.
nodes.comment: Step 2: Interp the Current Pelvis Offset to the new target value. Interpolate at different speeds based on whether the new target is above or below the current one.
